LAW AND MOTION 302, APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY & FOR PLAINTIFFS/OPPOSING PARTIES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT VERITAS SOFTWARE CORPORATION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION DENIED. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT SUBSTANTIVELY AND PROCEDURELY THE CONTRACT PROVISIONS ARE UNCONSCIONABLE AND VIOLATE ARMENDARIZ. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY.
